data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an exportable disclosure report.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for an exportable disclosure report for audits and patient requests. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific records, API responses, or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of such a report. The linked use case mentions the need for an exportable disclosure report but lacks concrete data or endpoints to verify this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of an exportable disclosure report for audits and patient requests.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of the exportable disclosure report.
